TUBITAK 3005 Project Support to Prof. Dr. Burak Doğruyol

The project titled “The Relationship of Moral Judgments with Moral Behavior: A Longitudinal Study” has been entitled to be supported under the TÜBİTAK 3005 program.

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Onurcan Yılmaz is also involved in the project as “Consultant”.

We congratulate Dr. Doğruyol and wish him success in his research.
